recipes.description: Direct database commit detected outside cron or migration scripts.
recipes.remediation: Remove cr.commit() calls; Odoo's framework handles transaction management automatically. If this is a long-running wizard or script, consider chunking or OCA queue_job.

recipes.description: Naked or bare exception catching (except: pass) found.
recipes.remediation: Catch specific exceptions (e.g., except UserError, except AccessError) and log errors using _logger.warning or _logger.error.

recipes.description: Potential raw SQL query injection via string formatting.
recipes.remediation: Never format queries with '%' or f-strings. Use parameterized syntax: cr.execute('SELECT * FROM table WHERE id = %s', (record_id,)). For Odoo 17.0+, use the SQL() wrapper.
Access transaction properties using environmental variables: use self.env.cr instead of self._cr, self.env.uid instead of self._uid, self.env.context instead of self._context.

recipes.description: Usage of <tree> tag in Odoo 18.0 or newer.
recipes.remediation: Odoo 18 deprecated <tree> views in favor of <list>. Replace tag <tree> with <list> in XML file.

recipes.description: Usage of name_get() method which is deprecated in Odoo 17.0+.
recipes.remediation: Override _compute_display_name() instead of name_get(). Set display_name field based on compute function.

recipes.description: Usage of read_group() method which is deprecated in Odoo 18.0+.
recipes.remediation: Override or call _read_group() instead of read_group(). Note that arguments and signature changed.

recipes.description: Model is defined in Python but lacks access rules in security/ir.model.access.csv.
recipes.remediation: Add an access rule for the model in security/ir.model.access.csv. Ensure correct model identifier prefixed with model_.

recipes.description: Module does not contain test cases.
recipes.remediation: Create a tests/ directory and write at least one backend TransactionCase extending Odoo test cases.

recipes.description: Manifest structure contains missing required keys or invalid schema.
recipes.remediation: Ensure keys like 'name', 'version', 'category', 'license', and 'depends' are defined and syntax matches target Odoo version.

recipes.description: Legacy OWL import statements detected (e.g., importing owl components via global namespaces in Odoo 17+).
recipes.remediation: Import OWL components directly from active modular js scopes or native owl imports depending on the Odoo version: in Odoo 16+ use native OWL 2 class semantics.

recipes.description: JS/CSS assets declared in backend views (deprecated in Odoo 16.0+).
recipes.remediation: Move all assets definitions (JS, SCSS, CSS) out of XML templates and declare them in the 'assets' dictionary key within the __manifest__.py file.

recipes.description: Legacy event binding syntax in QWeb templates.
recipes.remediation: In OWL 2 (Odoo 17+), ensure event bindings use correct OWL 2 syntax like t-on-click or similar directly on the target component element.
